findings.title: Privacy Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or data collection gaps. This could lead to violations of data minimization principles.
assumptions: Privacy risk keywords indicate potential compliance issues.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough review of data collection practices to ensure compliance with data minimization principles.

findings.title: Critical Push Notification Delivery Failure on Android 14
findings.description: The issue with push notifications failing on Android 14 devices poses a significant risk to user engagement and satisfaction. Immediate attention is required to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: Failure to deliver notifications on Android 14 affects user retention.

evidence.excerpt: Push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices.

recommendations: Fix the notification delivery issue on Android 14 devices immediately.

metadata.mitigation: Immediate fix for Android 14 notification delivery.

findings.title: High Pricing Concerns in Competitive Landscape
findings.description: SmartNotify's pricing is positioned lower than competitors, which could lead to perceptions of lower quality or value if not communicated effectively. This poses a risk to brand reputation and user trust.
assumptions: Lower pricing may lead to negative perceptions of product quality.

evidence.excerpt: SmartNotify's pricing is positioned lower than competitors.

recommendations: Enhance communication around product value to mitigate pricing concerns.

findings.title: Accessibility Concerns with Notification Center
findings.description: Users with accessibility needs face challenges navigating the notification center, particularly those using screen readers and colorblind users struggling with color-only indicators. This could lead to exclusion of users with disabilities.
assumptions: Accessibility issues may hinder user experience for individuals with disabilities.

evidence.excerpt: Users with accessibility needs face challenges navigating the notification center.

recommendations: Implement improvements to the notification center for better accessibility.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance accessibility features in the notification center.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential issues with GDPR and CCPA compliance. This could lead to legal repercussions if not addressed.
assumptions: Compliance risks may lead to legal challenges.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a compliance audit to ensure adherence to GDPR and CCPA.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 2 compliance, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
